title: Making Decisions and Repeating Work
description: Use conditionals and loops to make programs react to data and repeat work without repeating yourself.

lessons.title: Conditionals: if, elif, and else
objectives: Branch between paths with if, elif, and else
Compare values and combine conditions with and, or, and not
Recognise which values are truthy and falsy

lessons.title: Loops: for and while
objectives: Iterate over a sequence with for and count with range()
Repeat with while without creating an infinite loop
Control loops with break and continue

lessons.title: List Comprehensions
objectives: Build a new list with a comprehension
Filter items with an if clause
Judge when a comprehension aids readability and when a loop is clearer
